name: Into the Fog
description: Commander Thorn's third squad went east two days ago to investigate strange lights near the ruins. Six soldiers, no word since. Go to the site and find out what happened.
accept_text: Thorn taps the map. 'Third squad. Six soldiers. They went east — here — two days ago. Should have been back yesterday morning. I need eyes on that location.' He pauses. 'The vultures started circling the same time they went silent. Could be coincidence.' He doesn't say it isn't. 'Come back with something I can work with.'
complete_text: Thorn studies what you've brought back. He's quiet for a long time. 'No bodies. That's not what crabs or vultures do.' He picks up one of the fallen ID tags, reads it, sets it down. 'Third squad. I knew their sergeant.' A pause. 'Whatever happened out there — it matters. I'll find out how.'
